probe_manifest.comparison_policy: salted exact-hit counts must beat the equivalent random-trial multiplier, not merely increase in proportion to more uniform draws
probe_manifest.promotion_gate: full-stream negative rows, selected exact spans after metadata, ordinary held-out negative groups >= 3, controls null

summary.stop_reason: full-stream negative rows remain absent; salted hits do not beat the equivalent random-trial multiplier; ordinary held-out negative groups stay below three
summary.conclusion: Predeclared expander salts behave like extra random draws and do not yet create full-stream compression evidence.
